# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class SendgridMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: -> { default_from_address }

  class << self
    def default_from_address
      ENV["SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL"].presence || "no-reply@example.com"
    end

    def sendgrid_api_key
      ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"] || Rails.application.credentials.dig(:sendgrid, :api_key)
    end

    def smtp_settings
      {
        user_name: "apikey",
        password: sendgrid_api_key,
        domain: ENV["MAILER_DOMAIN"].presence || default_domain,
        address: "smtp.sendgrid.net",
        port: 587,
        authentication: :plain,
        enable_starttls_auto: true
      }
    end

    def default_url_options
      host = ENV["MAILER_HOST"].presence || default_domain
      protocol = ENV["MAILER_PROTOCOL"].presence || (Rails.env.production? ? "https" : "http")
      { host: host, protocol: protocol }
    end

    private

    def default_domain
      ENV["APP_DOMAIN"].presence || "localhost"
    end
  end

  def deliver_email(to:, subject:, template_name:, assigns: {}, from: nil, reply_to: nil, layout: "mailer")
    raise ArgumentError, "Missing SendGrid API key" if self.class.sendgrid_api_key.blank?

    assigns.each { |key, value| instance_variable_set("@#{key}", value) }

    mail(
      to: to,
      from: from || self.class.default_from_address,
      reply_to: reply_to,
      subject: subject,
      template_name: template_name,
      layout: layout
    )
  end
end

ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings = SendgridMailer.smtp_settings
ActionMailer::Base.default_url_options = SendgridMailer.default_url_options

if Rails.env.production?
  ActionMailer::Base.delivery_method = :smtp
  ActionMailer::Base.perform_deliveries = true
  ActionMailer::Base.raise_delivery_errors = true
else
  ActionMailer::Base.delivery_method = :smtp
  ActionMailer::Base.perform_deliveries = true
  ActionMailer::Base.raise_delivery_errors = true
end
